day0.label: Conferma spedizione (Giorno 0)
day0.subject: Your wine is on its way! 🍷
day0.body:
Dear {nome},

your order has been shipped and is now on its way to you!

{tracking_line}Delivery is estimated within 7–10 business days.

We will keep you updated as soon as we have news from customs or the final carrier.

Thank you for choosing Il Ciliegio!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

day10.label: Reminder 10 giorni (Standard e Express)
day10.subject: Shipping update — your order
day10.body:
Dear {nome},

here is an update on your shipment, which has been on its way for 10 days now.

At this stage your wine is likely crossing the ocean or awaiting customs clearance. We will write to you as soon as we receive any news from the carrier.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

day20.label: Reminder 20 giorni (solo Standard)
day20.subject: Your wine is still on its way — update
day20.body:
Dear {nome},

20 days have passed since your order was shipped. Standard shipments to some destinations can take up to 30 days for customs clearance and final delivery.

We are monitoring the situation and will update you as soon as the carrier provides any news.

Thank you for your patience!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

consegnato.label: Ordine consegnato
consegnato.subject: Your order has been delivered! 🍷 Enjoy!
consegnato.body:
Dear {nome},

great news! Your order has been successfully delivered. 🎉

We hope you enjoy the wines from Il Ciliegio. If you have any questions or feedback, do not hesitate to contact us — your opinion is very valuable to us.

Best regards,

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

dogana.label: In dogana
dogana.subject: Your order is going through customs
dogana.body:
Dear {nome},

your order is currently going through customs. This process usually takes 2–5 business days.

No action is required on your part — we will update you as soon as your order is on its way again.

Thank you for your patience!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

problema.label: Problema spedizione
problema.subject: ⚠ Important update on your shipment
problema.body:
Dear {nome},

I am reaching out regarding your order. Unfortunately, an issue has occurred with the shipment and we are already actively monitoring the situation.

Our team is working to resolve the matter and we will keep you updated as soon as possible.

For any urgent questions, please reply directly to this email.

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899
